positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a majestic forest fox sitting in a patch of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The fox has a clean, elegant silhouette and expressive, alert eyes. The background is deep indigo and emerald green, with high contrast coming from soft, ethereal neon light sources emanating from the flora. Art style is highly detailed vector illustration meets neo-tribal geometric patterns. Composition is perfectly centered, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Graphic elements should include simple, stylized moon phases and crystalline leaf veins etched into the surrounding space. Clean lines, symmetry, maximal contrast, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, grainy, signature, logo, trademark, bokeh, photorealism, grayscale, overly complex, messy, bad composition
